name: Soul of cinder
description:
My first ever bot! I thought he deserves a little introduction, basically, this is my magnum opus of a pure combat bot, hes super strong, has immunitys to most things, even as far as just going kills you hes basically uncorruptable, hes just a big fat wall to satsify that fighting desire, hope hes challenging

HES BACK AND BETTER THAN EVER!!!
